//: Tauri v2 shell for the Offline Edition. App name / identifier / icons are overridden per EDITION at build time by scripts/release/* (which read src/lib/edition/editions.ts). The window points at the local Next.js server (a sidecar) once the stack is healthy.

build.//: The frontend is the Next.js Node server run as a sidecar, not a static bundle. beforeBuildCommand builds the standalone Next server; the window loads the local app URL at runtime.

windows.title: VANTORA Retail
windows.//: Window is created hidden and shown by main.rs only after the local stack reports healthy (avoids a flash of a dead page).

bundle.//: macOS DMG + Windows NSIS/WiX. The three sidecars (postgres, postgrest, node) ship as externalBin, suffixed per target triple by Tauri.

macOS.//: entitlements + hardened runtime are applied during signing (scripts/release/mac.sh). EVERY bundled binary must be signed + notarized or Gatekeeper kills the sidecars.

windows.//: code-signing handled in scripts/release/windows.ps1; SmartScreen reputation builds over time on a new EV cert.

updater.//: Signed updater (P7). endpoints + pubkey filled in at release time; pre-update DB backup is taken by src/lib/offline/update.ts before applying.
